person that I had to be that my whole childhood with my kids, I thought about that

I thought about my travel and work. I travel a lot. I'm thinking, if we're not talking about

They're core values. I worked really hard on having Sunday meetings. And I see me, I'm

Another one is putting the kids in the middle. My parents put the kids in the middle

Again, same thing. I was with them so much and now I got to split my time in half. Am I

I thought about hard timelines, summer vacation.
Summer vacation, oh my God. Every year for 45 days. We live in Phoenix where it's the

and everything was fine. But over to the right was a hurricane, a storm, just ripping up,

And this circumstance, the one thing was becoming friends with my ex wife. No matter
what it took. That was the solution. That solved every one of the problems I have
written down, problems or worries every one could be solved. No negative talk. The kids
won't get fractured. I don't have to worry about my travel. I can keep the core values.
The kids won't be in the middle. I'll have time with the kids. There won't be hard
timelines. We could figure out summer vacation. Money won't be an issue. Missing
them won't be a problem. Dating, no worries. I'll tell her about it and we can
communicate. When I saw that I was like, that's it. Everybody screws that up. Then the
opposite part is how do I make sure that becomes a reality? If the one thing is being her
friend, now my whole obsession is not all the things to solve the problems. My
obsession is, how do I obsess on that one thing to make it a reality?
And that's when I went to active listening. No matter what she said, even if I didn't
agree, I actively listened. I let her know. I didn't keep score. I had no ego. I had
unconditional support. I don't take things personal. I make sure she feels safe. I talk
great about her to everybody, the kids, and everybody I run into. I promise I would
never talk negative about her. I'll always consult on any decision I make with the kids if
it's a big decision. I'll be her friend, not just lip service. They were the solutions to make
the one thing happen and guess what? That's all I focused on. That's all I obsessed on.
Even when I was frustrated with her, doesn't mean it was her fault or mine. Even when I
was frustrated with her, active listening. I need to make her my friend because at one
thing solves everything.
I'd like to share with you right now. I'm in the best relationship in my life. I'm madly in
